strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise across multiple projects and companies
Demonstrated ability to scale and lead engineering teams through various roles
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure, though has worked on various complex systems
No explicit mention of experience with agentic frameworks like LangGraph
Not directly mentioned experience operating AI systems in regulated environments

key_factors.factor: Experience with AI and agentic workflows

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a strong background in software development and technical leadership, with relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and distributed systems. His experience at re:cinq and other companies demonstrates his ability to work on complex systems and lead engineering teams, making him a strong fit for the Chief Technology Officer role.
